description.value:
Prerequisite: At least three ranks in the Charismatic Hero class.

Benefit: Character gains two talents from the Charismatic hero's talent trees. The talents must be selected from the following list, and the character must meet all prerequisites: Charm Talent Tree: Favor or Captivate. Fast-Talk Talent Tree: Dazzle or Taunt. Leadership Talent Tree: Inspiration or Greater Inspiration.

Special: This feat may be selected multiple times. Each time it is selected, a different pair of talents must be chosen than the previous times.
